com.pax.poslink.broadpos

Class BroadPOSCommunicator

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.broadpos.BroadPOSCommunicator

  • public class BroadPOSCommunicator
extends java.lang.Object
    A class that POSlink communicates with BroadPOS.

        detectMode - The detectMode:

        eg: swipeAnyTime is "10000000".
        detectAnyTimeListener - DetectAnyTimeListener

        V1.04.00
